spells.design_notes: Base 3, +1 Touch, +2 Group, +3 size, +1 fancy effect (the spell effectively keeps being cast while the caster walks seven miles)
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Perdo Herbam Spells > LEVEL 30 > Treading the Ashen Path
spells.description: As you walk through a forest after casting this spell, all the plant material 10 paces in front of you and 5 paces to either side withers and dies. Trees are reduced to bare trunks, while their leaves and all smaller plants turn to ash. You can walk for 7 miles with each casting of this spell. Use of this spell in faerie woods is not recommended. This spell was originally invented by a magus of House Flambeau, and he was awarded a prize for it by his primus.

spells.name: Ward against Faeries of the Wood
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Ring, T: Circle
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > GENERAL > Ward against Faeries of the Wood
spells.description: Like Ward Against Faeries of the Waters (ReAq Gen), but for faeries of the wood. At some angles, at night, the ring appears to be a green-hued dome.

spells.name: Dance of the Staves
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 5 > Dance of the Staves
spells.description: Causes a pole, staff, haft, or any other long, thin, non-living wooden object to bend and lash about wildly for a few seconds and then stop suddenly. A whirling staff strikes its holder and does +4 Damage, with a possible bonus if the weapon at the head of the pole hits the person.

spells.name: Repel the Wooden Shafts
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 10 > Repel the Wooden Shafts
spells.description: Deflects a single blow of any weapon made of wood, up to the size of a twohanded club. The attack automatically misses, but the attacker still rolls to see if he or she botches (with two extra botch rolls for melee weapons). If you ordinarily carry a wooden staff, it must be tossed aside for the casting.

spells.name: Strike of the Angered Branch
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Part
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 15 > Strike of the Angered Branch
spells.description: Causes a large tree branch to swing at a target. The branch's Attack score is equal to your Perception + Finesse. Damage is +10. You may strike repeatedly with the branch, striking once per round for as long as the spell lasts.

spells.name: Tangle of Wood and Thorns
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 15 > Tangle of Wood and Thorns
spells.description: Takes a length of wood that you designate and hurls it at a target (a Targeting roll is required). The wood wraps around and immobilizes the target (assuming that there is enough wood), who must make a Strength stress roll against an Ease Factor of 9 to break free (one attempt per round). If the victim ever botches, he cannot escape without outside help. If the length of wood has thorns, it does +6 damage when it hits, and again each time the target tries to break free, whether successful or not. When the caster stops concentrating, the target can escape on a Strength roll against an Ease Factor of 6.

spells.name: Coils of the Entangling Plants
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Group
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 20 > Coils of the Entangling Plants
spells.description: Animates all the grass and small plants within a field delineated from side to side by your outstretched arms and in front by no more than 15 paces of distance. The plants grab and wrap themselves around the people nearest to them (Strength stress roll of 9+ to break free, rolled once per minute). If a roll to break free ever botches, the victim cannot escape on his or her own. With a Concentration roll of 6+, you can release one individual a round.

spells.name: Lord of the Trees
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 25 > Lord of the Trees
spells.description: Causes a tree to move its branches and bend its trunk in any way you mentally direct. A large tree striking with branches has Initiative +5, Attack +7, and Damage +10. Normal weapons are practically useless against large trees.

spells.name: The Treacherous Spear
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Diam, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 25 > The Treacherous Spear
spells.description: This spell animates a wooden or wooden-hafted melee weapon in someone else's hand, and makes that weapon attack its holder until the wielder is dead or the weapon is destroyed. When the spell is cast, the weapon tries to break its wielder's hold (Quickness – Encumbrance stress roll against an Ease Factor of 9 to hang on). On subsequent rounds, the wielder hangs on by making Strength stress rolls against an Ease Factor of 6, allowed once per round. If a roll to hold on ever botches, the wielder loses control of the weapon and is hit by it automatically (see below). While still in its wielder's grip, the weapon does not strike him or her, but does not strike on the wielder's behalf either. Once the weapon breaks free or is released, it attacks its wielder, using his Attack and Damage scores. The former wielder may fight the rebellious weapon. The weapon uses its defense rating as its Defense total. It has no Soak, and is 'killed' after it takes a wound depending on its size. One-handed weapons must take a Medium Wound, while two-handed weapons must take a Heavy Wound. The damage of thrusting and missile weapons is halved when attacking the renegade weapon.

spells.name: Twist the Living Tree
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 25 > Twist the Living Tree
spells.description: You make a living tree bend into unusual positions. Depending on your needs, you can make a cage, a shelter, or a wall. Even the leaves can be commanded, maybe to form a solid roof that sheds rain. Takes one to ten minutes to complete (depending on the complexity of the new shape), during which time you must maintain concentration.

spells.name: Ward against Wood
spells.parameter_line: R: Per, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 25 > Ward against Wood
spells.description: The caster is protected from nonenchanted wood, so that none of it can contact his body. If he is walking on a wooden surface, he is actually suspended very slightly above it.

spells.name: Freeing the Striding Tree
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 30 > Freeing the Striding Tree
spells.description: Like Lord of the Trees, above, but the tree can walk half as fast as a human can. If you botch a Concentration roll to maintain control, the tree attacks you, having been awakened and disturbed by this spell.

spells.name: Calling the Council of the Trees
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Moon, T: Bound, Ritual
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Muto Herbam Guidelines > Rego Herbam Spells > LEVEL 45 > Calling the Council of the Trees
spells.description:
You call all magical and potentially mobile trees within the woodland where you cast the ritual to the site of the ritual. The trees are compelled to come, and will likely be interested in whoever has called them. The attitude of the trees depends on the forest and the nature of the one who called. Once gathered, the trees hold meetings, summon ancient powers, and discuss the problems facing their kind. You may speak, and understand what the trees are discussing. The results of the conference may not be entirely in your favor. The trees remain animated for a month and may seek to return home before the end of that period.

(Base 5, +1 Touch, +3 Moon, +4 Bound, no cost for Intellego effect)
---

spells.name: Moonbeam
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 3 > Moonbeam
spells.description: Causes a gentle light, bright enough to read by, to shine down from above and illuminate the area described by your encircled arms. Lasts as long as you hold your arms in a circle.

spells.name: Palm of Flame
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 5 > Palm of Flame
spells.description: A flame leaps up in your palm, which must be upturned for the spell's duration. The flame casts light like a torch, and can ignite very flammable items. It does no damage, and does not burn the caster.

spells.name: Heat of the Searing Forge
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Heat of the Searing Forge
spells.description: Heats a piece of metal so that it is too hot to touch. Something the size of a breastplate or helmet does +5 damage if in direct contact with the skin for one round. For each additional round, more damage is done, the amount dropping by two points each round (+3 damage on round two, then +1). Smaller objects do less damage. Most metal armor has leather or cloth underneath that gives the victim a +3 Soak bonus against the heat.

spells.name: Lamp without Flame
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > Lamp without Flame
spells.description: This spell creates a steady light as bright as daylight on a cloudy day. The light has no apparent source, but illuminates an area about ten paces across, centered on a point indicated by the caster. This point may be a mobile item.

spells.name: Blade of the Virulent Flame
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Diameter, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Blade of the Virulent Flame
spells.description: Forms a fire along the length of a metal blade. This flame doubles the weapon damage score for the blade (or adds +5, whichever is greater), and can start fires as well. If the spell is cast repeatedly on the same blade, the blade gets hot enough to melt after half an hour, which ends the spell. Letting the blade cool for half an hour between castings avoids this.

spells.name: Flash of the Scarlet Flames
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > Flash of the Scarlet Flames
spells.description: A brilliant red flash explodes in the air where you designate. If you target a person's face the target needs a Stamina stress roll against an Ease Factor of 9 to avoid temporary blindness. If the target botches the roll, he is permanently blinded. If temporarily blinded, he can try to make a simple Stamina roll against an Ease Factor of 9 each minute to recover. The flash is equivalent to looking straight at the sun. In Rose of Jerbiton's version of this spell, there is a faint odor of roses in the area where the flash explodes.

spells.name: Pilum of Fire
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Pilum of Fire
spells.description: A 2-foot, thick, spear-shaped jet of fire flies from your palms, doing +15 damage to the individual it hits.

spells.name: Arc of Fiery Ribbons
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Group
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Arc of Fiery Ribbons
spells.description: A dozen multi-hued ribbons of flame leap from your hands and fly out as far as your voice carries, covering a 60-degree arc. All those in the arc take +10 damage.

spells.name: Coat of Flame
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Diam, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Coat of Flame
spells.description: The target is swathed in fire, and takes +5 damage every round while the spell is in effect. That is, the damage must be rolled against Soak twenty times during the spell. The Rego requisite ensures that the fire does not spread.

spells.name: Ball of Abysmal Flame
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 25, +2 Voice; the ball appearing to shoot from your hand is a cosmetic effect
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Ball of Abysmal Flame
spells.description: A ball of flame shoots from your hand to strike a single target, doing +30 damage. Marius of Tremere's version of the spell causes the ball to make a loud bang when it hits the target. His sigil is a gaudiness in his spells.

spells.name: Circle of Encompassing Flames
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Creo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Circle of Encompassing Flames
spells.description: Creates a circle of flames 6 feet high. The circle begins at a 1-pace radius, but you can make it shrink to a pillar or grow to a 3-pace radius as you concentrate if you cast with a Rego requisite. Anyone moving through the flames takes +20 damage. You cannot move the center of the circle.

spells.name: Tales of the Ashes
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Conc T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Intellego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 5 > Tales of the Ashes
spells.description: Lets you see what the ashes you touch originally were, and how and when the object was burned. The latter two are divined from markings and signs in the ashes.

spells.name: Shadows of the Fires past
spells.parameter_line: R: Per, D: Mom, T: Vision
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Intellego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Shadows of the Fires past
spells.description: Allows you to see where fires have been in the past lunar month. A light red flickering haze appears where the fire was, and you gain an intuitive sense of when the fire was there. This spell does not look into the past, but detects the traces of fire.

spells.name: Vision of Heat's Light
spells.parameter_line: R: Per, D: Sun, T: Vision
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Intellego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Vision of Heat's Light
spells.description: Allows you to see the heat of objects that are of human body temperature or hotter. Excellent for use in the dark, but it doesn't give true vision. You can see well enough to use a weapon, even a missile weapon, without penalty, but recognizing people is very difficult.

spells.name: Eyes of the Flame
spells.parameter_line: R: Arc, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Intellego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Eyes of the Flame
spells.description: Lets you see a fire to which you have an Arcane Connection. You can also see all those things which the fire illuminates.

spells.name: Words of the Flickering Flame
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Intellego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Words of the Flickering Flame
spells.description: Allows you to converse with a fire, commonly very chaotic and distractible. Promising a fire more fuel might keep its interest. Fires are mostly aware of what they've burned, but they have a limited awareness of what goes on around them as well.

spells.name: The Many-hued Conflagration
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Muto Ignem Spells > LEVEL 5 > The Many-hued Conflagration
spells.description: Makes a fire burn brightly in shifting colors for an instant. Each being looking at the fire must make a Stamina stress roll against an Ease Factor of 6 or be blinded for one round by the multicolored lights.

spells.name: Show of the Flames and Smoke
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Muto Ignem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Show of the Flames and Smoke
spells.description: Causes smoke of different colors, streams of flame, and strange popping and sizzling noises to come from a fire. The effect is so spectacular that onlookers are either entranced or horrified, depending on the circumstances. The pyrotechnics might ignite nearby flammable objects and cause minor burns to those within 2 paces of the fire.

spells.name: Hornet Fire
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Muto Ignem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Hornet Fire
spells.description: Turns a fire into a swarm of fireballs, each the size of a large insect, that fly and harass at your command. Their burning touch gives one person within range both a –3 penalty on all rolls and two extra botch dice, but they do not cause actual damage.

spells.name: Prison of Flames
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Muto Ignem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Prison of Flames
spells.description: Turns a bonfire into a prison shaped like a miniature castle. A person thrown into the middle is not burned, but takes +15 damage if he or she tries to escape.

spells.name: Trapping the Fire
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 5, +2 Voice, +2 Sun, requisite is free
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Muto Ignem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Trapping the Fire
spells.description: This spell turns the heat and flames of a large campfire into a small, very hard object, such as a gem or a piece of metal. If the object is broken, the flame returns, but dies if there is nothing to burn.

spells.name: Flames of Sculpted Ice
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Muto Ignem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Flames of Sculpted Ice
spells.description: Turns a fire up to the size of a small house into ice. The ice forms beautiful sculptures of leaping flame, until it begins to melt. When the ice has melted halfway, the flames start again, but probably won't spread, because of wet surroundings.

spells.name: Gloom of Evening
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Diam, T: Room
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Perdo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Gloom of Evening
spells.description: The level of light in the target room drops substantially, making the room gloomy, with deep shadows everywhere.

spells.name: Winter's Icy Touch
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Perdo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Winter's Icy Touch
spells.description: Causes the target to feel a chill and lose body heat. The target loses a Fatigue level.

spells.name: Soothe the Raging Flames
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Perdo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Soothe the Raging Flames
spells.description: Eradicates the heat of a bonfire, which, however, continues to burn until the fuel already covered in flame is consumed. The flames do not spread, or harm anything beyond what they were already burning. If the fire is extinguished and relit, it will burn hot again, as it is now a different fire.

spells.name: Well without Light
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Str
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Perdo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Well without Light
spells.description: Removes light from the target structure. Only spells greater than level 25 can create light within this area. When casting this spell, magi typically clench a hand into a fist, and the light flows into the fist like a living entity, until the entire area is dark.

spells.name: Conjuration of the Indubitable Cold
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Part
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Perdo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Conjuration of the Indubitable Cold
spells.description: Cools the air within ten paces of the target, leaving it slightly below freezing. All nonliving things are chilled thoroughly, not just on the surface. All living things (except you, if you cast with a Rego requisite) lose one Fatigue level. House fires become as small as campfires, bonfires become as small as torch fires, and campfires and smaller fires go out.

spells.name: Wizard's Icy Grip
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Perdo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 30 > Wizard's Icy Grip
spells.description: Chills a single target so that it takes +20 damage. If this is enough to kill, the target is frozen solid. Armor does not add to Soak against this spell.

spells.name: Wizard's Eclipse
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Diam, T: Bound, Ritual
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Perdo Ignem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Wizard's Eclipse
spells.description: The sun is eclipsed within the target area, making it as dark as night. The darkness begins very suddenly — the superstitious are likely to panic, especially if they see that there is normal daylight just beyond the boundary of the spell.

spells.name: Tremulous Vault of the Torch's Flame
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Rego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 5 > Tremulous Vault of the Torch's Flame
spells.description: Causes a fire to guiver a few seconds and then make a leap of up to 10 feet in any direction. A Targeting roll is required to hit a specific target. The flame stays at the spot it hits if it can burn there (see rules for fire damage on page 407). Otherwise, it simply scorches the spot and goes out (doing +5 damage).

spells.name: Leap of the Fire
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Rego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Leap of the Fire
spells.description: Causes a bonfire to make a leap of up to 10 paces in any direction, where it catches if there is fuel, or burns out if there is none. Make a Targeting roll to hit a target; the flames do +10 damage.

spells.name: Light Shaft of the Night
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Group
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Rego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Light Shaft of the Night
spells.description: Collects moonbeams and starlight into a single vertical shaft of soft, silvery light that moves under your control. It illuminates an area 15 paces across with light nearly equal to sunlight (if the moon is out) or moonlight (if the moon is not out). If the sky is overcast, the spell does not work. Can only be cast under the night sky.

spells.name: Burst of the Sweeping Flames
spells.parameter_line: R: Sight, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 10 (4 + 2 magnitudes for the intensity of the fire), +3 Sight
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Rego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Burst of the Sweeping Flames
spells.description: This spell causes a fire to explode outwards from its source along the ground, as if a giant wind were blowing on it from above. The fire travels for no more than 10 paces, but it ferociously ignites anything in its path. The original fire is left dead, but in all probability a number of new fires will be started. The flames cause +5 to +15 damage, depending on the intensity of the original fire.

spells.name: Ward against Heat and Flames
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Ignem Spells > Rego Ignem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Ward against Heat and Flames
spells.description:
Keeps heat and fire at bay, unable to approach within a couple of inches of the target. This renders the target immune to damage from flames or heat of intensity less than that of molten iron. The target gets a +15 Soak against all fire-related damage. Any fire doing less than +15 damage per round doesn't penetrate the ward. Such fires simply dim at the protected person's passing and flare back up after he or she is gone.

(Base 4, +2 for up to +15 damage, +1Touch, +2 Sun)
---

spells.name: Phantasm of the Talking Head
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Diam, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Creo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Phantasm of the Talking Head
spells.description: Creates an illusory face on a wall or other flat object. The visage can speak during the spell's duration. Individual wizards' sigils can produce very interesting differences in how the voice sounds, how the face looks, and so on.

spells.name: Phantasmal Animal
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Diam, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 3, +2 Voice, +1 Diam, +2 move under your command
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Creo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Phantasmal Animal
spells.description: Creates an image of any animal or beast up to the size of a pony (Size +1). Under your direct mental command, it moves about (within range) and makes appropriate noises. You need to be able to concentrate, and be within range, whenever you wish to direct the illusion to move in some manner. If you move out of range or stop concentrating, the illusion just freezes in place. The image does smell like an animal, but it has absolutely no effect on the sense of touch. Of course, a magus may not use this spell to create the image of an animal he or she does not know exists.

spells.name: Phantasmal Fire
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 3, +2 Voice, +2 Sun, +1 for light from Ignem requisite
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Creo Imaginem Spells > Phantasmal Fire
spells.description: Makes an image of a fire (up to the size of a large campfire) that dances, illuminates, crackles, and (apparently) warms. It does not spread, burn, or protect against cold. Makes a great joke at gatherings of House Flambeau, although creating a real fire is even more popular.

spells.name: Phantasm of the Human Form
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 2, +2 Voice, +2 Sun, +2 move at your command, +1 intricacy
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Creo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Phantasm of the Human Form
spells.description: Makes an image of a clothed and equipped person that can make noise. Under your direct, unspoken command, the person can move about, speak, and behave as a human does.

spells.name: Haunt of the Living Ghost
spells.parameter_line: R: Arc, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 2, +4 Arc, +1 Conc, +2 move at your command, +1 intricacy, +1 Intellego requisite
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Creo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Haunt of the Living Ghost
spells.description: With this spell, you can instantly project your own image and voice to any designated spot that you have an Arcane Connection to (though troupes may wish to limit this range to some absolute distance like 300 miles). You can see and hear through the image. The image must appear in some medium, such as a fire, mirror, or pool. Some magi use this spell to attend inter-covenant councils without traveling the intervening distance. Because other magi can see you, this spell is not held to constitute scrying by magic. Using it through another covenant's Aegis counts as showing off, however.

spells.name: The Shadow of Human Life
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 2, +1 Touch, +2 Sun, +1 intricacy, +6 Mentem requisite, for a very elaborate effect
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Creo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 40 > The Shadow of Human Life
spells.description: The human image created (as in Phantasm of the Human Form) has limited freedom and simulated intellect. It functions as an independent human, albeit a stupid one, capable of interpreting general orders in new situations.

spells.name: Discern the Images of Truth and Falsehood
spells.parameter_line: R: Per, D: Conc, T: Vision
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Intellego Imaginem Spells > GENERAL > Discern the Images of Truth and Falsehood
spells.description: You can tell whether an image has been created or altered through a spell, seeing both the original and false images in the case of alterations. This spell must be at least 1 magnitude higher than an illusion in order to discern it. If you botch the spell, you mistake illusions for the real thing and reality for illusion. Your discernment is not limited to visual illusions, although you can only tell that a sound is illusory if you are looking at the apparent source.

spells.name: Prying Eyes
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Conc, T: Room
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Intellego Imaginem Spells > Prying Eyes
spells.description: You can see inside a room, as long as you can touch one of its walls. If the room is unlit or poorly lit, you can only see as much as you could if you were inside, but magical enhancements of your senses do apply. You may change your viewpoint within the room throughout the duration of the spell.

spells.name: Discern Own Illusions
spells.parameter_line: R: Per, D: Sun, T: Vision
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Intellego Imaginem Spells > Discern Own Illusions
spells.description: This spell makes your own illusions appear largely transparent to you, but still discernible.

spells.name: The Ear for Distant Voices
spells.parameter_line: R: Arc, D: Conc, T: Room
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Intellego Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 20 > The Ear for Distant Voices
spells.description: You can hear what is happening in the place you designate. You must have an Arcane Connection with the place or with a person there.

spells.name: Eyes of the Eagle
spells.parameter_line: R: Per, D: Sun, T: Vision
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Intellego Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Eyes of the Eagle
spells.description: You see distant things clearly. No matter how far away something is, you can make out details as if it were only a foot or so from you. Things do not all appear to be a foot away; you can simply make out details as well as if they were. You can still judge distance accurately; in fact, more accurately than normal, to within an inch or so at a distance of several miles, since you can see as clearly as if you were judging distance a foot away.

spells.name: Summoning the Distant Image
spells.parameter_line: R: Arc, D: Conc, T: Room
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Intellego Imaginem Spells > Summoning the Distant Image
spells.description: You can see and hear what is happening in a distant place if you have some sort of Arcane Connection to either the location or a person there.

spells.name: Taste of the Spices and Herbs
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Muto Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 5 > Taste of the Spices and Herbs
spells.description: A setting's worth of food or drink tastes and smells exactly as you designate.

spells.name: Aura of Ennobled Presence
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Muto Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Aura of Ennobled Presence
spells.description: The target appears more forceful, authoritative, and believable. Numerous subtle changes in appearance bring about this change, including a slight supernatural illumination of the face, a more erect posture, and a louder and smoother voice. The character gets a +3 on rolls to influence, lead, or convince others.

spells.name: Notes of a Delightful Sound
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Room
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Muto Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Notes of a Delightful Sound
spells.description: Causes all sounds in a room, particularly music, to be especially clear and sonorous. The notes are clearer, sharper, and more distinct

spells.name: Disguise of the Transformed Image
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Muto Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Disguise of the Transformed Image
spells.description: Makes someone look, sound, feel, and smell different, though at least passably human.

spells.name: Image Phantom
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Muto Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Image Phantom
spells.description: Any one thing, including a living thing, can be made to appear as if it were something else of approximately the same shape and size. The illusion cannot be cast on things that have a shape or size improper to the final appearance. If the target moves or is moved in such a way that the illusion is inappropriate, it looks very strange indeed.

spells.name: Dispel the Phantom Image
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Perdo Imaginem Spells > GENERAL > Dispel the Phantom Image
spells.description: Destroys the image from any one CrIm spell whose level you match or exceed on a stress die + the level of your spell.

spells.name: Taste of the Dulled Tongue
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Perdo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 5 > Taste of the Dulled Tongue
spells.description: Hides the taste of any substance, liquid or solid.

spells.name: Illusion of Cool Flames
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Perdo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Illusion of Cool Flames
spells.description: A source of heat, such as a fire, seems to lose its heat and drop to the surrounding temperature. It still, however, has its normal beneficial and harmful effects (that is, glowing coals still cook meat or burn a person's hand, though they do not feel hot).

spells.name: Invisibility of the Standing Wizard
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Perdo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Invisibility of the Standing Wizard
spells.description: The target becomes invisible, but the spell is broken if the target moves (aside from breathing and shifting slightly in place). He still casts a shadow.

spells.name: Veil of Invisibility
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Perdo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Veil of Invisibility
spells.description: The target becomes completely undetectable to normal sight, regardless of what it does, but still casts a shadow.

spells.name: Removal of the Conspicuous Sigil
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Part
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Perdo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Removal of the Conspicuous Sigil
spells.description: Grooves, runes, writings, and similar markings are obscured so that they are not visible, but the overall shape of the medium remains constant. For example, runes carved into a sword blade can be made invisible, making the sword appear normal.

spells.name: Silence of the Smothered Sound
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Perdo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Silence of the Smothered Sound
spells.description: Makes one being or object incapable of producing sound. Magi who cannot utter their magic words suffer the normal penalties to their spellcasting rolls.

spells.name: Chamber of Invisibility
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Group
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Perdo Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Chamber of Invisibility
spells.description: Causes a Group of creatures to become invisible. Any affected character who moves or is touched makes everyone visible. All members of the Group still cast shadows.

spells.name: Restore the Moved Image
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Rego Imaginem Spells > GENERAL > Restore the Moved Image
spells.description: Cancels a ReIm spell that moves an image, putting the image back where it belongs, as long as you can match the spell's level on a stress die + the level of your spell. This spell targets the image.

spells.name: Illusion of the Shifted Image
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Rego Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Illusion of the Shifted Image
spells.description: Makes any person or object appear to be a pace away from its actual position. The image cannot be placed in a solid object. As soon as the original or image moves, the spell ends.

spells.name: Wizard's Sidestep
spells.parameter_line: R: Per, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 2, +2 Sun, +1 changing image, +1 moved image matches changes
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Rego Imaginem Spells > Wizard's Sidestep
spells.description: Your image appears up to 1 pace from where you actually are, so attacks aimed there are likely to miss you. Whenever the image is successfully struck, it disappears and reappears in another spot. In combat, early attacks are aimed at the image, and so automatically miss you. Once the image has been hit once, you have a +9 bonus to Defense, as attackers must try to find you in a fairly large area.

spells.name: The Captive Voice
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Part
spells.design_notes: Base 4, +2 Voice, +2 Sun, +1 Part, +1 changing image
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Rego Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 30 > The Captive Voice
spells.description: Captures a person's voice and places it in a bag. The person may not speak unless the bag is open, in which case the voice comes from the bag, not the victim's mouth. If the victim screams while the bag is shut, the bag vibrates visibly.

spells.name: Confusion of the Insane Vibrations
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Conc, T: Vision
spells.design_notes: Base 3, +1 Touch, +1 Conc, +4 Vision, +1 additional senses
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Rego Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 30 > Confusion of the Insane Vibrations
spells.description: The target of the spell sees everything vibrate back and forth at varying high speeds. In addition, sounds are displaced and seem to come from the wrong areas. Anyone trying to fight in these circumstances suffers –3 on Attack and Defense scores, and must roll two extra botch dice. The target is likely to become desperate and terribly confused. Navigation is exceedingly difficult. The visual effects of this spell are negated if the target is in complete darkness or if they close their eyes.

spells.name: Image from the Wizard Torn
spells.parameter_line: R: Per, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 15, +1 Conc, +1 additional sense, +1 moving image, +1 Intellego requisite
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Rego Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Image from the Wizard Torn
spells.description: Your image separates from your body. It can speak whatever you say and do so in your voice, and you can see through its eyes. You must make an Int + Concentration stress roll for each solid object the image passes through and for each mile it travels. If you wish the image to be able to leave your sight, you must use an Arcane Connection to yourself (for example, a fingernail or a lock of hair) when you cast the spell. That connection becomes an integral part of the image, and when the spell ends, it falls to the ground wherever the image was located. As your image is away from your body, you are invisible and silent at your actual location. The image is your image, so while you may move it in space you may not have it sit down if you are standing. Further, it appears as if illuminated by whatever light is falling on you, no matter what the level of illumination is at the image.

spells.name: Illusion of the Misplaced Castle
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Bound, Ritual
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Imaginem Guidelines > Rego Imaginem Spells > LEVEL 50 > Illusion of the Misplaced Castle
spells.description:
Moves the image of any bounded structure or set of structures the size of a castle or less up to one mile from its actual position.

(Base 10, +2 Voice, +2 Sun, +4 Bound)
---

spells.name: Words of the Unbroken Silence
spells.parameter_line: R: Sight, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Words of the Unbroken Silence
spells.description: Lets you say two words directly to the mind of a target. The target can recognize your voice and knows that the message is of supernatural origin.

spells.name: Panic of the Trembling Heart
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Panic of the Trembling Heart
spells.description: Creates an overpowering fear in one person of a specific object, person, or place.

spells.name: Rising Ire
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Rising Ire
spells.description: Makes the target furious at someone or something of your choice. A stress roll against an Ease Factor of 9 using an appropriate Personality Trait (like Calm) can hold the anger in check, but it is felt strongly regardless of the roll.

spells.name: Memory of the Distant Dream
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Memory of the Distant Dream
spells.description: Inserts a full and complete memory into a person's mind. If the target gives the memory some thought and concentration, and makes an Intelligence roll against an Ease Factor of 9, the memory is revealed as false. When the duration expires, the memory vanishes, although the subject may remember remembering it.

spells.name: Pains of the Perpetual Worry
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Moon, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Pains of the Perpetual Worry
spells.description: Gives someone a nagging, taunting, painful emotion — a recurrent sense of anxiety, a fear of something he or she does not know, a fear of everything, and a fear of nothing. To have this spell cast on you is truly a curse.

spells.name: Weight of a Thousand Hells
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Moon, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Weight of a Thousand Hells
spells.description: Causes the victim to feel the despair, anguish, pain, and sorrow of a thousand sinners in Hell. This is a horrible spell, for the victim loses almost all motivation and earthly cares. All he can feel is his own pain – endless, inexorable, and searing. Appropriate Personality Trait rolls suffer a harmful adjustment of –5, and the target suffers –2 on any rolls that require thought or concentration. The target has a strong tendency to do nothing but brood.

spells.name: Gift of Reason
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Mom, T: Ind, Ritual
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Gift of Reason
spells.description: Permanently increases the target's Intelligence by 1 point, to no higher than 0.

spells.name: Sight of the Transparent Motive
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Intellego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Sight of the Transparent Motive
spells.description: Detects the general motive most powerfully influencing the target at the moment. General motives are such things as fear, anger, and greed, not specific things like the desire to look good before one's superiors.

spells.name: Perception of the Conflicting Motives
spells.parameter_line: R: Eve, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Intellego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Perception of the Conflicting Motives
spells.description: You can detect the conflicting motives behind one target's actions. Thus you might learn that a guard feels conflict between fear and duty. This spell is often used before application of a Muto or Rego spell, since it is usually easier to change a target's emotions after you've sensed them than it is to create emotions.

spells.name: Frosty Breath of the Spoken Lie
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 10, +1 Eye, +1 Conc, mist is a purely cosmetic effect and thus is free
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Intellego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Frosty Breath of the Spoken Lie
spells.description: For as long as you maintain this spell, the target exhales a misty breath with each spoken lie. Small bits of ice form on the person's lips if the lie is particularly severe. In winter, when breath is visible anyway, lies produce a greater than normal amount of mist (the mist actually billows out). A target who makes a Communication + Guile stress roll against an Ease Factor of 15 can determine whether any given statement will be taken by the spell as a lie. The spell can be defeated through extensive and judicious application of Creo Auram and Perdo Auram spells, and a demon is able to manipulate it in any way it wishes, as demons are the embodiment of deception and are never caught in a lie if they do not wish to be. House Guernicus brought the Order this spell, and it is a very poor Quaesitor who is without it.

spells.name: Posing the Silent Question
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Intellego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Posing the Silent Question
spells.description: You can ask one silent mental question of the target, then detect the answer. The truth of the answer is limited by the knowledge of the target. Questions to the effect of "What would you do if ...?" often receive inaccurate replies. You are likely to get what the target thinks he would do, not necessarily what he would really do. The target of this spell does not notice the questioning unless he or she resists the spell, in which case they notice the attempt.

spells.name: Thoughts within Babble
spells.parameter_line: R: Per, D: Conc, T: Hearing
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Intellego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Thoughts within Babble
spells.description: You can understand the speech of those within the target area. Perception or Communication stress rolls are needed for difficult exchanges. You also understand people who misuse a language that you do speak; you know what they meant to say, as well as hearing what they actually said.

spells.name: Peering into the Mortal Mind
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Intellego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 30 > Peering into the Mortal Mind
spells.description: You can thoroughly probe and understand the contents of the mind of the target, including his or her immediate and long-term motives, personal strengths and weaknesses, and other pertinent information.

spells.name: Recollection of Memories Never Quite Lived
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Muto Mentem Spells > LEVEL 4 > Recollection of Memories Never Quite Lived
spells.description: Changes the target's memory of a detail into a similar, though different, memory. The target is no more sure of this manufactured memory than of the authentic one, so he may discover strange fabrications to be false.

spells.name: Mind of the Beast
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Muto Mentem Spells > LEVEL 30 > Mind of the Beast
spells.description: You turn the mind of the target into that of an animal of your choice. The victim acts and thinks like that animal as much as possible; a person who thinks he is a bird will try to fly, but will not be able to. This can be dangerous for the target.

spells.name: Past of Another
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Year, T: Ind, Ritual
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Muto Mentem Spells > LEVEL 35 > Past of Another
spells.description: The target's memories are completely rewritten, and he is unable to remember his actual life until the effect is dispelled or expires.

spells.name: Inmost Companion
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Muto Mentem Spells > LEVEL 40 > Inmost Companion
spells.description: The target's mind is made physical as a bird. This bird normally stays close to the target's body, but need not. If the target has Magic Resistance, it protects both his body and mind, as normal. No matter how far it travels, the target's mind controls his body, as well as the bird's, as normal. In particular, it can see through both sets of sense organs. If the bird is killed, the target also dies, as his mind has been killed.

spells.name: Vision of the Haunting Spirits
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Sun, T: Room
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Muto Mentem Spells > LEVEL 40 > Vision of the Haunting Spirits
spells.description: All spirits within the target area become visible, although they might remain unseen if hiding behind something. This includes the spirits of living people, which appear as the person normally does. If the person is invisible or otherwise changed from his normal shape, his normal appearance is superimposed on his current appearance.

spells.name: Lay to Rest the Haunting Spirit
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > GENERAL > Lay to Rest the Haunting Spirit
spells.description: If your spell Penetrates the resistance of a ghost or similar spirit, it loses a number of points from its Might equal to the level of this spell. If this reduces the spirit's Might to zero, it vanishes, apparently destroyed. Philosophers concur that the spirit goes to the afterlife, or is perhaps weakened to helplessness, but is not actually destroyed. Souls, after all, are immortal.

spells.name: Tip of the Tongue
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Diam, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 5 > Tip of the Tongue
spells.description: Causes the target to forget one word of your choosing. The target cannot remember that word for the spell's duration, but afterwards he can come up with the word without assistance by making an Intelligence + Concentration stress roll against an Ease Factor of 9. If the target fails he may try again, but each additional roll adds +1 to the difficulty.

spells.name: Trust of Childlike Faith
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Diam, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Trust of Childlike Faith
spells.description: The target loses judgment and believes almost any passable lie for the duration of the spell. An Intelligence stress roll against an Ease Factor of 6 is allowed to resist. Truly incredible lies allow easier resistance rolls.

spells.name: Calm the Motion of the Heart
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Calm the Motion of the Heart
spells.description: Removes one emotion from the target until it appears again naturally. An angry person stops being angry, and a curious one stops being inquisitive. Many a magus finds this spell useful for keeping his apprentice's nose out of his immediate business.

spells.name: Enchantment of Detachment
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Enchantment of Detachment
spells.description: Calms and greatly lowers the intensity of the target's current emotions.

spells.name: Loss of But a Moment's Memory
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Loss of But a Moment's Memory
spells.description: Removes up to five continuous minutes from a target's memory, leaving a blank. You target the loss of memory to a specific event or time. With an Intelligence stress roll against an Ease Factor of 9, the target realizes that memories of a certain period are missing. This Ease Factor can change, depending on how important the missing memory is and what sort of circumstances surrounded the event. Careful introspection over a period of time can allow reconstruction of much of the memory, but some details are lost forever.

spells.name: Blessing of Childlike Bliss
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Blessing of Childlike Bliss
spells.description: Reduces an adult mind to a child's level. The target solves problems, reasons, and expresses emotions as would a three-year-old. Magi affected cannot cast spells. At first, anyway, the target is likely to be happy at having lost a world of cares and troubles that are no longer imaginable.

spells.name: Passion's Lost Feeling
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 25 > Passion's Lost Feeling
spells.description: The target is unable to feel any sort of emotion and acts listlessly, without motivation or cares.

spells.name: Black Whisper
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Moon, T: Ind
spells.design_notes: Base 15, +1 Touch, +3 Moon, +1 for not needing to gesture
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 40 > Black Whisper
spells.description: You whisper a magic sentence in the target's ear. It takes several seconds to speak the sentence, so an unwilling, able-bodied target can stop you. If you speak the whole sentence, the target must make a Stamina stress roll against an Ease Factor of 15 or go completely insane. You need not use your hands for this spell, but you must be able to speak.

spells.name: Poisoning the Will
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Moon, T: Bound, Ritual
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Perdo Mentem Spells > LEVEL 65 > Poisoning the Will
spells.description: You curse a place, be it a valley, town, city, or covenant. The curse gradually saps the will and vitality from the people there. They become less energetic, and slowly stop caring about the place, what happens there, other people, and finally themselves. Colors seem more drab and the days longer, and there is an all-pervading sense of boredom and lassitude. Strong-willed individuals and those with strong Personality Traits are less affected, but still suffer to an extent. All Personality Trait rolls while in the area suffer a -3modifier. This spell affects only those who are within the cursed area, including visitors to it. Those who leave the area are overwhelmed by the return of their vigor and sense of purpose.

spells.name: Ring of Warding against Spirits
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Ring, T: Circle
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > GENERAL > Ring of Warding against Spirits
spells.description: Only ghosts and spirits with current Magic Might higher than the spell's level can enter the ring you create. At certain angles, the ring may be seen as an orange-hued dome. This spell does not affect ghosts or spirits associated with the other realms.

spells.name: The Call to Slumber
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice D: Mom. T: Ind.
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 10 > The Call to Slumber
spells.description: The target becomes sleepy and falls asleep within a few seconds.

spells.name: Snap of Awakening
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Snap of Awakening
spells.description: When you snap your fingers you instantly awaken the target from sleep to alert consciousness. Does not work on someone unconscious from Fatiguelevel loss, wounds, or magic.

spells.name: Confusion of the Numbed Will
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 15 > Confusion of the Numbed Will
spells.description: Confuses a person, who must make an Intelligence stress roll to take any direct action. A roll of 12+ ends the spell, while a roll of 9+ lets the character take the intended action, but the spell remains in effect. Any lower roll means the character is confused and takes some other type of action. When it is imperative for the victim to take an action, the storyguide should allow an appropriate modifier to the roll. While under this spell, a character always strikes last in combat and gets at least a -1 on all attacking and defending rolls.

spells.name: Aura of Rightful Authority
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Aura of Rightful Authority
spells.description: The target of the spell is strongly inclined to obey you, as if you were his natural superior.

spells.name: Coerce the Spirits of the Night
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Conc, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Coerce the Spirits of the Night
spells.description: Makes a ghost obey you as long as you can coerce it with threats, such as a threat to defile its grave or to banish it to Hell. The more lurid and dramatic the threat, the more cooperative the ghost is. If the spell penetrates the ghost's Magic Resistance, roll Communication + Leadership to see how effective your threats are. The storyguide should always give a bonus or penalty that depends on the potency of the threat, and any roll other than a botch will compel at least minimal obedience.

spells.name: Scent of Peaceful Slumber
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Mom, T: Room
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 20 > Scent of Peaceful Slumber
spells.description: Everyone in the room falls asleep over a few seconds, with the smell of lilacs in their nostrils

spells.name: Visions of the Infernal Terrors
spells.parameter_line: R: Voice, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 30 > Visions of the Infernal Terrors
spells.description:
Causes everything the target sees to look and sound terrifying. The world looks basically the same, save that everything is hideously transformed somehow. The target must roll a stress die, adding his Stamina and adding or subtracting an appropriate Personality Trait to see what the effects are. The nature of the Personality Trait used determines how it affects the Stamina roll. A Trait like Brave makes you resistant to fear, while one like Cowardly reduces the result of your roll.
| Roll      | Result                                                                          |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 0 or less | Scared to death (literally)                                                     |
| 1–5       | Incapacitated with fear, permanent –1 to Stamina                                |
| 6–9       | Incapacitated with fear                                                         |
| 10–15     | Flee, fight at –6 if cornered or obstructed                                     |
| 16+       | Carry on, -3 on all rolls                                                       |

spells.name: Enslave the Mortal Mind
spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Sun, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 40 > Enslave the Mortal Mind
spells.description: Enables you to completely control the loyalty, emotions, desires, interests, and activities of any person. People revert to normal when the spell ends, and may be extremely angry with the magus.

spells.name: Incantation of Summoning the Dead
spells.parameter_line: R: Arc, D: Conc, T: Ind, Ritual
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > Incantation of Summoning the Dead
spells.description:
Calls up a person's ghost. You must be on the spot where the person died, or must have the corpse (either of these constitutes an Arcane Connection). Alternatively, you can summon any ghost that haunts the area you are in, if you know the ghost's full name, according to the Law of Names. Those buried by Church ceremony and those have who gone straight to heaven (that is, saints and crusaders, as opposed to the normal folk who must wait for a time before going on) are not available for summoning. This spell is a ritual because it can summon those who are beyond the mortal world, as long as they are not in heaven. If the ghost has Magic Resistance, you must penetrate that resistance in order to summon it.

(Base 15, +4 Arc, +1 Conc)
##### The Shrouded Glen
R: Touch, D: Year, T: Bound, Ritual

Enchants the Boundary in which the ritual is cast so that anyone moving through it is subtly diverted, effectively keeping some place within it from being discovered accidentally. Anyone not actively searching for the hidden place never finds it. Those actively searching can find the place by making a Perception stress roll against an Ease Factor of 12 (allowed once per day). If the surrounding terrain is more difficult to search than the average forest, the Ease Factor increases. Likewise, the Ease Factor drops if the terrain is more open than a forest, and completely open terrain is unsuitable for this spell. Once a searcher spots the hidden place, the spell does not prevent approach. Those who are present for the ritual are unaffected by the spell. This spell mimics the properties of many faerie forests.

spells.name: The Shrouded Glen
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Year, T: Bound, Ritual
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > Incantation of Summoning the Dead > The Shrouded Glen
spells.description: Enchants the Boundary in which the ritual is cast so that anyone moving through it is subtly diverted, effectively keeping some place within it from being discovered accidentally. Anyone not actively searching for the hidden place never finds it. Those actively searching can find the place by making a Perception stress roll against an Ease Factor of 12 (allowed once per day). If the surrounding terrain is more difficult to search than the average forest, the Ease Factor increases. Likewise, the Ease Factor drops if the terrain is more open than a forest, and completely open terrain is unsuitable for this spell. Once a searcher spots the hidden place, the spell does not prevent approach. Those who are present for the ritual are unaffected by the spell. This spell mimics the properties of many faerie forests.

spells.name: Exchange of the Two Minds
spells.parameter_line: R: Touch, D: Year, T: Group, Ritual
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Rego Mentem Spells > Exchange of the Two Minds
spells.description:
This spell switches the minds (but not the souls) of two creatures. A new body greatly confuses those who are unprepared for the shock, and even those who are ready take a day to adjust completely. Magi who transport their own minds into younger, healthier bodies usually find that having a strong body entails having powerful passions that interfere with the clear thinking needed to pursue the magical Arts. Both people involved must make a Stamina stress roll against an Ease Factor of 3, rolled before the switch is made, to survive the transfer. If only one person fails the roll, that person dies and the spell fails. The other target is unaffected.

(Base 20, +1 Touch, +4 Year, +2 Group)
---

spells.parameter_line: R: Eye, D: Mom, T: Ind
spells.heading_path: Chapter 9: Spells > Creo Mentem Spells > Intellego Mentem Spells > LEVEL 10 > Sight of the Transparent Motive
